title: Format
description:
Implement a program that reads name(s) from a text file and outputs them in "Last, First" format.

**Input format (name.txt):**
```
Al Sweigart
Tony Gaddis
```

**Output:**
```
Sweigart, Al
Gaddis, Tony
```

**Constraints:**
- Use regular expressions to split names
- Handle names with multiple parts
- Read from and write to files
difficulty:
common_mistakes": [
      "Not using regex correctly to parse names",
      "Not handling edge cases (single name, multiple spaces)",
      "Incorrect regex pattern matching"
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "validate",
    "title": "Validate",
    "description": "Implement a program that validates email addresses and phone numbers using regular expressions.

**Email validation:**
- Must have exactly one @ symbol
- Must have at least one character before @
- Must have domain with . and top-level domain

**Phone validation:**
- Accepts formats like: (123) 456-7890, 123-456-7890, 1234567890

**Constraints:**
- Use the `re` module
- Write comprehensive regex patterns
- Test multiple formats",
    "check50_slug": "cs50/problems/2024/python/validate",
    "difficulty": "medium",
    "common_mistakes": [
      "Regex pattern too simple (doesn't catch invalid formats)",
      "Not testing all valid/invalid formats",
      "Using ^ and $ anchors incorrectly"
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "watch",
    "title": "Watch",
    "description": "Implement a program that extracts YouTube video IDs from URLs using regular expressions.

**URL formats to support:**
- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID
- https://youtu.be/VIDEO_ID
- http://youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID

**Example:**
```
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ
Video ID: dQw4w9WgXcQ
```",
    "check50_slug": "cs50/problems/2024/python/watch",
    "difficulty": "easy",
    "common_mistakes": [
      "Not handling both youtu.be and youtube.com URLs",
      "Regex pattern not capturing video ID correctly",
      "Not handling optional protocol (http vs https)"
    ]
  }
]
